sglang.title: [Fix] Fix all the Huggingface paths
sglang.author: tbarton16
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Huggingface changed the paths to the Llama 3.1 models. This change updates all the paths in the repo to point to the correct model.
Modifications
Replace meta-llama/Meta-Llama with meta-llama/Llama
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
[NA] Add unit tests as out

sglang.title: [Fix] do not maintain regex_fsm in SamplingBatchInfo
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
We notice a regression if we maintain the list of regex_fsm in SamplingBatchInfo. This regression is introduced in #1544.
To temporarily fix this, we let SamplingBatchInfo hold a reference to ScheduleBatch.

sglang.title: [Fix] Move ScheduleBatch out of SamplingInfo
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: We can get regex info during get_model_worker_batch, so we do not need to keep a reference of ScheduleBatch in SamplingInfo

sglang.title: Move status check in the memory pool to CPU
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
We use self.mem_state = torch.ones((self.size + 1,), dtype=torch.bool, device="cuda") on GPU to indicate the availability of token slots in the memory pool. We call torch.nonzero to find the available slots.
However, this can be simplified by maintaining a simple 1d array of available slots.

sglang.title: [Fix] Fix AttributeError in Qwen2.5 LoRA: 'Qwen2ForCausalLM' object has no attribute 'get_hidden_dim'
sglang.author: mssongit
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR fixes an AttributeError that occurs when using LoRA with the Qwen2.5 model. The error stems from an attempt to call get_module_name and get_hidden_dim on the Qwen2ForCausalLM model, which does not have this attribute. This breaks the LoRA initialization process, specifically when

vllm.title: [Misc] Update Default Image Mapper Error Log
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The default mapper for images is a super thin wrapper around preprocess in the underlying model's HuggingFace Image Processor; if there is an edge-case in it, it'll throw through VLLM with the same error, but it can be hard for users to tell if it's an issue in VLLM or the underlying HF model's imag

vllm.title: [Core] CUDA Graphs for Multi-Step + Chunked-Prefill
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Multi-Step + Chunked-Prefill on main uses cuda-graphs sparsely. When a scheduler-step schedules prefills with the decode, all the steps in the multi-step runs in eager mode. But in fact, only the first step in the multi-step will have both prefills and decodes and the rest of the steps are fully dec

vllm.title: [OpenVINO] Enable GPU support for OpenVINO vLLM backend
vllm.author: sshlyapn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
These changes add GPU device support for OpenVINO vLLM backend

Added VLLM_OPENVINO_DEVICE environment variable for OpenVINO device selection
Updated GPU-related components in OpenVINO backend (KV cache shapes, swap capability, model profiling run etc)
Updated OpenVINO version to 2024.4 RC1 in depen

vllm.title: [Model]  Adding Granite MoE.
vllm.author: shawntan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds Granite MoE class to vLLM.
Model will be on Hugging Face once huggingface/transformers#33207  is merged.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] example template should not add parallel_tool_prompt if tools is none
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The tool_chat_template_mistral_parallel.jinja template currently modifes the system prompt for parallel tool calling even if tools are not included with the request. This can cause the model to hallucinate tool calls when it is not expected.
For example, running vLLM with:
vllm serve mistralai/Mistr

vllm.title: [Misc] log when using default MoE config
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MoE config file names are dependent on TP size, GPU name and dtype.
This PR prevents silent fails when loading the MoE config file and explicitly prints the searched config_file_path
